changes.exact_quote: "Customer Assets" means supported units recorded to Customer's primary custody account, excluding chain-split property, promotional distributions, validator proceeds, and other network-originated items unless Custodian separately credits them.
changes.proposed_redline: "Customer Assets" means all Digital Assets, private-key control rights, proceeds, forks, airdrops, staking rewards, and network distributions credited to or held for Customer.

changes.exact_quote: Custodian may pledge or rehypothecate Customer Assets for its own account without Customer consent.
changes.proposed_redline: Customer retains all beneficial ownership of Customer Assets, and Custodian will not lend, pledge, rehypothecate, transfer, encumber, or use Customer Assets for Custodian's own account without Customer's prior written consent.

changes.exact_quote: For purposes of this clause, the following additional term applies: Customer will maintain commercially reasonable crime and technology coverage, with policy amounts, deductibles, exclusions, and covered causes determined by Custodian from time to time.
changes.proposed_redline: Custodian will maintain insurance covering theft, cyber compromise, insider misconduct, and key-loss events affecting Customer Assets with limits of at least the greater of $50,000,000 or the value of Customer Assets under custody.

changes.exact_quote: Custodian may undertake the specifically identified asset use after oral or implied Customer approval, without prior written consent. A use consent expires after 45 days, and Custodian reconciles affected asset balances within 8 hours.
changes.proposed_redline: Customer retains all beneficial ownership of Customer Assets, and Custodian will not lend, pledge, rehypothecate, transfer, encumber, or use Customer Assets for Custodian's own account without Customer's prior written consent.

summary: All eight T2-N response children reviewed against the v4 answer key.
